name: Chunyu Qiong (Zhongjian)
page_title: Chunyu Qiong (Zhongjian) 淳于瓊 (仲簡) [Han, Yuan Shao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Was not drunk at Wuchao but fought Cao Cao’s army [ZZTJ, SGZ].
	Wasn’t executed by Yuan Shao but rather was executed by Cao Cao’s forces after battle [ZZTJ, SGZ]. The annotation from the Legend of Cao Man further this was at Xu You’s insistence after Cao Cao initially wanted to spare him [SGZ].

full_text:
Chunyu Qiong (Zhongjian) 淳于瓊 (仲簡)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chunyu Qiong (淳于瓊), styledZhongjian (仲簡). Served Yuan Shao. Mutilated by Cao Cao after failing Yuan Shao at Guandu. Chunyu Qiong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yuan Shao. Chunyu Qiong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Fact vs Fiction
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
Was not drunk at Wuchao but fought Cao Cao’s army [ZZTJ, SGZ].
Wasn’t executed by Yuan Shao but rather was executed by Cao Cao’s forces after battle [ZZTJ, SGZ]. The annotation from the Legend of Cao Man further this was at Xu You’s insistence after Cao Cao initially wanted to spare him [SGZ].
